title: Trips Dashboard (Yesterday)

sql.statement: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_duration_seconds,0))/3600.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(v.vehicle_id::text, o.object_id::text, t.device_id::text)) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT ROUND(AVG(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT ROUND(SUM(t.avg_speed * t.track_duration_seconds) / NULLIF(SUM(t.track_duration_seconds),0), 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE AND COALESCE(t.track_duration_seconds,0) > 0;
SELECT MAX(t.max_speed) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN t.start_zone IS NOT NULL AND t.start_zone = t.end_zone THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0), 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', t.track_start_time) AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', t.track_start_time) AS category, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', t.track_start_time) AS category, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_duration_seconds,0))/3600.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT LPAD(EXTRACT(HOUR FROM t.track_start_time)::text, 2, '0') AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0) < 5000 THEN '<5 km'
            WHEN t.track_distance_meters < 20000 THEN '5-20 km'
            WHEN t.track_distance_meters < 50000 THEN '20-50 km'
            WHEN t.track_distance_meters < 100000 THEN '50-100 km'
            ELSE '100+ km'
        END AS category,
        COUNT(*) AS value
    FROM business_data.tracks t
    WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
      AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1
) s
ORDER BY 
    CASE category
        WHEN '<5 km' THEN 1
        WHEN '5-20 km' THEN 2
        WHEN '20-50 km' THEN 3
        WHEN '50-100 km' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END;

SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(t.track_duration_seconds,0) < 900 THEN '<15 min'
            WHEN t.track_duration_seconds < 1800 THEN '15-30 min'
            WHEN t.track_duration_seconds < 3600 THEN '30-60 min'
            WHEN t.track_duration_seconds < 7200 THEN '1-2 h'
            ELSE '2+ h'
        END AS category,
        COUNT(*) AS value
    FROM business_data.tracks t
    WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
      AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1
) s
ORDER BY 
    CASE category
        WHEN '<15 min' THEN 1
        WHEN '15-30 min' THEN 2
        WHEN '30-60 min' THEN 3
        WHEN '1-2 h' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END;

SELECT COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, 'Unknown') AS category, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, 'Unknown') AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT COALESCE(g.group_label, 'Unassigned') AS category, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.groups g ON g.group_id = o.group_id WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

SELECT COALESCE(t.start_zone, 'Unknown') AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15;

SELECT COALESCE(t.end_zone, 'Unknown') AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15;

SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN COALESCE(t.max_speed, 0) < 50 THEN '<50'
            WHEN t.max_speed < 80 THEN '50-79'
            WHEN t.max_speed < 100 THEN '80-99'
            WHEN t.max_speed < 120 THEN '100-119'
            ELSE '120+'
        END AS category,
        COUNT(*) AS value
    FROM business_data.tracks t
    WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day'
      AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE
    GROUP BY 1
) s
ORDER BY 
    CASE category
        WHEN '<50' THEN 1
        WHEN '50-79' THEN 2
        WHEN '80-99' THEN 3
        WHEN '100-119' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END;

SELECT COALESCE(t.start_zone, 'Unknown') AS start_zone, COALESCE(t.end_zone, 'Unknown') AS end_zone, COUNT(*) AS trips, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS distance_km FROM business_data.tracks t WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY trips DESC LIMIT 20;

SELECT COALESCE(v.vehicle_label, v.registration_number, o.object_label, 'Unknown') AS asset_name, COALESCE(g.group_label, 'Unassigned') AS group_name, COUNT(*) AS trips, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_distance_meters,0))/1000.0, 2) AS distance_km, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(t.track_duration_seconds,0))/3600.0, 2) AS drive_hours, ROUND(AVG(t.avg_speed), 2) AS avg_speed_kmh, MAX(t.max_speed) AS max_speed_kmh FROM business_data.tracks t LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.vehicles v ON v.object_id = o.object_id LEFT JOIN raw_business_data.groups g ON g.group_id = o.group_id WHERE t.track_start_time >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' AND t.track_start_time < CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY distance_km DESC;

description: Trips dashboard based on business_data.tracks for yesterday with indicators on top and maximum two bar charts per row
